name: ADMINISTRATIVE MANAGER

experience.title: Administrative Manager
experience.description: Answer multiple phone lines, Bookkeeping, Sending and receiving emails, faxes, copying, Managed office inventory and placed new supply orders, Sorting & distributing mail, IT &Telecoms Troubleshooting, Collections Account Reconciliation, Developed and administered department budgets, Liaised directly with customers to meet needs and maintain satisfaction.

experience.title: Administrative Assistant
experience.description: Answer multiple phone lines, Handle daily reports, Sending emails,faxing,copying, Making outbound calls to customers, Ordering office supplies, Data entry, Scheduled appointments and maintained master calendar, Updated employee paperwork and records.

experience.title: Front Desk/ Customer Service Rep
experience.description: Arranges for customer travel, hotel reservations, and auto rental, Tracks aircraft arrival and assures prompt line service, Arranges for prompt customer de-briefing by appropriate technical personnel, Dispatch information to line service and pilots.

experience.title: Registrar / Receptionist
experience.description: Answering telephones, Register patients, Verifying insurances, Enter patients information into computer, Follow up on unpaid claims within standard billing cycle timeframe, File patients document.

summary: Highly skilled bilingual (English/Spanish) and motivated professional seeking a suitable position in your esteemed facility.
